name: ckap-v3-render-supabase
description: Central Krabi Analytics Platform Render + Supabase package

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend ci && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.verify: npm --prefix backend run build && npm run test && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.check: npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix frontend ci && npm run verify
